get.description: List all creators with details. (don't use the try it out button or your page will crash)

favorited.description: The number of times this creator has been favorited

indexed.description: Timestamp when the creator was indexed, Unix time as integer

updated.description: Timestamp when the creator was last updated, Unix time as integer

parameters.name: o
parameters.description: Result offset, stepping of 50 is enforced

example.title: 今日はFANBOXを始まりました！
example.content:
みなさんこんにちは、影おじです。

先週のように、FANBOXを始まりに決定しました！

そしてFANBOXの更新内容について、アンケートのみなさん

ありがとうございました！


では更新内容の詳しいことはこちらです↓

毎回の絵、元も差分がありませんの場合、ボナスとして差分イラストを支援者の皆様にプレゼント。

もとも差分があれば、ボナスとしてヌード差分イラストを支援者の皆様にプレゼント。


これから、仕事以外の時間、できる限り勤勉な更新したいと思います！

どうぞよろしくお願いいたします！

example.title: 忍ちゃん  脇コキ差分

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The service where the creator is located

public_id.description: The public ID of the creator

service.description: The service where the creator is located

indexed.description: The time the creator was last indexed

updated.description: The time the creator was last updated

404.description: The creator could not be found

get.description: List account favorites (posts or creators) for the authenticated user (cookie session)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of favorites to list (post or creator (artist) )

faved_seq.description: The sequence number of the favorite

id.description: The ID of the favorite (post or creator)

indexed.description: Timestamp when the creator was indexed isoformat

last_imported.description: Timestamp when the creator was last imported

service.description: The service where the creator is located

updated.description: Timestamp when the creator was last updated

post.description: Add a post to the user's favorite posts

302.description: Redirect to login if not authenticated

delete.description: Remove a post from the user's favorite posts

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The service where the post is located

302.description: Redirect to login if not authenticated

post.description: Add an creator to the user's favorite creators

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The service where the creator is located

302.description: Redirect to login if not authenticated

delete.description: Remove an creator from the user's favorite creators

parameters.description: The service where the creator is located
